posts.headline: How to read a strategy board without chasing noise
posts.body: What makes a strategy feed usable? Repeated snapshots, ranked leaders, and a clear filter for noise. Today that means tracking brk R 2 tp20.0 sl30.0, brk R Rev 2 tp20.0 sl50.0 and ignoring one-off spikes.
posts.call_to_action: Join for deeper breakdowns behind each strategy setup.
